name: Nick Scali Limited
analysis: NCK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 37% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$16.0000, stop A$13.4937, target A$17.8200 (0.73:1) — then trail it.
